title: Adapting Humanoid Locomotion over Challenging Terrain via Two-Phase Training
title_zh: 通过两阶段训练实现人形机器人在复杂地形上的自适应运动
abstract:
Humanoid robots are a key focus in robotics, with their capacity to navigate tough terrains being essential for many uses. While strides have been made, creating adaptable locomotion for complex environments is still tough. Recent progress in learning-based systems offers hope for robust legged locomotion, but challenges persist, such as tracking accuracy at high speeds and on uneven ground, and joint oscillations in actual robots.
    This paper proposes a novel training framework to address these challenges by employing a two-phase training paradigm with reinforcement learning. The proposed framework is further enhanced through the integration of command curriculum learning, refining the precision and adaptability of our approach. Additionally, we adapt DreamWaQ to our humanoid locomotion system and improve it to mitigate joint oscillations. Finally, we achieve the sim-to-real transfer of our method. A series of empirical results demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 人形机器人是机器人学的重点，其穿越复杂地形的能力对许多应用至关重要。尽管已取得进展，但为复杂环境创建自适应运动仍然困难。近期基于学习的系统为鲁棒腿式运动带来了希望，但仍存在挑战，例如高速和不平地面上的跟踪精度，以及实际机器人中的关节振荡。本文提出一种新颖的训练框架，通过采用两阶段强化学习范式来应对这些挑战。该框架进一步通过命令课程学习的集成得到增强，提高了方法的精度和适应性。此外，我们将DreamWaQ适配到人形运动系统并加以改进以减轻关节振荡。最终，我们实现了方法的仿真到现实迁移。一系列实证结果表明，与最先进方法相比，我们提出的方法具有优越性能。
tldr_zh: 提出两阶段强化学习框架，结合命令课程学习与改进的DreamWaQ，实现人形机器人复杂地形自适应运动。
cover_zh: 人形机器人也能跑酷？两阶段训练让它在复杂地形上稳如老狗
